title: 30o: BlobLookupResponse.not_found Option vs Vec undocumented
description: crates/jmap-chat/src/methods/blob.rs line 33: not_found is typed as Option<Vec<String>> with #[serde(default)], meaning both a missing field and an explicit JSON null deserialize to None. The doc comment does not explain why it is Option rather than Vec (which is the typical JMAP notFound shape), nor what None means (field absent vs null). Add a doc comment explaining the deliberate choice.
close_reason: fixed as part of 30o.14: Vec<String> with serde(default)
